wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: List.get(0) is not removed in Java 21, so this is not strictly breaking for compilation, but the intent is to adopt the new API. However, per rules, if it compiles on old JDK, it's polishment. Wait, the prompt says 'bucket=breaking ONLY if the migration won't compile or run on the target JDK without this change'. Since get(0) works on J21, this is polishment.
